name: codeseex
description: Local Codex-compatible DeepSeek bridge with a desktop manager.
author: TasteSteak

scripts.check: node --check src/electron/main.js && node --check src/manager/server.js && node --check src/manager/process-control.js && node --check src/manager/process-cleanup.js && node --check src/manager/static/app.js && node --check src/shared/config.js && node --check src/shared/codex-auth.js && node --check src/proxy/server.js && node --check src/proxy/deepseek-client.js && node --check src/proxy/network-dispatcher.js && node --check src/proxy/streaming/index.js && node --check src/proxy/web-search-executor.js && node --check src/tools/apply-patch/index.js && node --check src/codex/model-catalog.js
scripts.dist:win: npm run build:catalog-seed && electron-builder --win nsis portable
scripts.dist:mac: npm run build:catalog-seed && electron-builder --mac dmg zip
scripts.dist:linux: npm run build:catalog-seed && electron-builder --linux AppImage deb tar.gz
